stemHtml: While airborne, you hear an urgency message on the area control frequency that is promptly acknowledged by the controller. What should you do?

options.a: Cease all transmissions on the urgency traffic frequency immediately.
options.b: Report your position immediately so you can provide assistance.
options.c: Avoid interfering with the urgency traffic communications.
options.d: Record the transmitted information and relay it on the emergency frequency.
